title: SakuraChat [Stopped]
description:
[EN] With this plugin you can decorate your chat      
[RU] С помощью этого плагина вы можете украсить свой чат
body:
![SakuraPluginIco](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/832b74700a5c20f0ee5675dbc41269545dd918c6.png) [![Downloads](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/dt/sakurachat?color=00AF5C&label=Downloads&logo=modrinth)](https://modrinth.com/plugin/sakurachat "Modrinth Downloads")

Русский

С помощью данного плагина вы сможете поменять чат на вашем сервере в MInecraft, так же плагин хорошо настраеваемый что поможет сделать чат ещё красивее и уютнее. Данный плагин предназначен только для изменения внешнего вида чата.
RU Messages

ru.yml

```yml # By yushi4ka # v1.2.5.1 # # Support: https://discord.gg/f3M5aZufpc # Source: https://github.com/yushi4ka/SakuraChat # # Using: § and & # Plugin Placeholder: %name% and %message% tag: "[&#E43A96S&#E64A9Ea&#E759A6k&#E969AEu&#EA78B6r&#EC88BEa&#ED97C6C&#EFA7CEh&#F0B6D6a&#F2C6DEt&f] " Messages: cmd-no-permission: "§c§l× §cУ вас недостаточно прав!" cmd-reload-message: "§a§l✅ §aКонфигурация плагина была перезагружена!" global-chat-disabled: "§c§l× §cГлобальный чат выключен!" no-players-nearby: "§c§l× §cВас никто не услышал." lang-changed: "§a§l✅ §aЯзык был изменен!" lang-already-in-use: "§c§l× §c Данный язык уже используеться." invalid-language: "§c§l× §c Недопустимый язык." lang-usage: "§c§l× §cИспользование: §f/schat lang §c<название языка>" Chat-Messages: local-chat-format: '§eL §r%luckperms_prefix%§r%name%§r%luckperms_suffix%§r: §7%message%' global-chat-format: '§aG §r%luckperms_prefix%§r%name%§r%luckperms_suffix%§r: §e%message%' JoinQuit-Messages: Join-message: "§a§l→ §r%name%§a присоединился к серверу." Quit-message: "§c§l← §r%name%§c покинул сервер." ```

![splitter](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/42c0138331a26035c811980f010c088f35dfc09b.png)

English

Using this plugin, you can change the chat on your server in MInecraft, the plugin is also highly customizable, which will help make the chat even more beautiful and comfortable. This plugin is intended only to change the appearance of the chat.
EN Messages

en.yml

```yml # By yushi4ka # v1.2.5.1 # # Support: https://discord.gg/f3M5aZufpc # Source: https://github.com/yushi4ka/SakuraChat # # Using: § and & # Plugin Placeholder: %name% and %message% tag: "[&#E43A96S&#E64A9Ea&#E759A6k&#E969AEu&#EA78B6r&#EC88BEa&#ED97C6C&#EFA7CEh&#F0B6D6a&#F2C6DEt&f] " Messages: cmd-no-permission: "§c§l× §cYou don't have enough permissions!" cmd-reload-message: "§a§l✅ §aPlugin configuration has been reloaded!" global-chat-disabled: "§c§l× §cGlobal chat is disabled!" no-players-nearby: "§c§l× §cNo one heard you." lang-changed: "§a§l✅ §aLanguage has been changed!" lang-already-in-use: "§c§l× §c This language is already in use." invalid-language: "§c§l× §c Invalid language." lang-usage: "§c§l× §cUsage: §f/schat lang §c


Конфигурация плагина | Plugin Configuration


config.yml

config.yml

```yml # By yushi4ka # v1.2.5.1 # # Support: https://discord.gg/f3M5aZufpc # Source: https://github.com/yushi4ka/SakuraChat # # Download: PlaceholderAPI and LuckPerms # For PlaceholderAPI: /papi ecloud download LuckPerms # # Using: § and & # Plugin Placeholder: %name% and %message% lang: en.yml global-chat: true global-chat-syntax: '!' local-chat-radius: 25 chat-display: enable: true expiration-time: 5 format: "§f%message%" filter: enable: true color: §c list: # - test # - fuck ```

![splitter](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/42c0138331a26035c811980f010c088f35dfc09b.png)

Кастомные эмодзи | Custom Emoji


emoji.yml

emoji.yml

```yml # By yushi4ka # v1.2.5.1 # # Support: https://discord.gg/f3M5aZufpc # Source: https://github.com/yushi4ka/SakuraChat emoji: smile: symbol: "☺" placeholder: ":)" # sad: # symbol: "☹" # placeholder: ":(" # heart: # symbol: "❤" # placeholder: "<3" # smile1: symbol: "☺" placeholder: ":smile:" # sad1: # symbol: "☹" # placeholder: ":sad:" # heart1: # symbol: "❤" # placeholder: ":heart:" ```
